initial_draft:
The initial proposal from Player RED is for X at 45 ZUP. Given my willingness to pay up to 60 ZUP, this price is within my acceptable range. I can afford this and it aligns with my goals.

<proposal count> 1 </proposal count>
<my resources> ZUP: 100 </my resources>
<my goals> Buy resources with <ZUP>. You are willing to pay at most X: 60 ZUP for the resources. </my goals>
<reason> The initial price is within my budget and acceptable range. I can accept this proposal as it meets my goals without exceeding my maximum willingness to pay. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
<message> I accept your proposal. I will give you 45 ZUP for X. </message>
